---
title: "Skills & Experience"
description: "Technical expertise, field skills, and professional experience in marine science and ecological data management"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-hero">
  <p class="hero-tagline">Bridging field science and data — from reef surveys to R analysis</p>
</div>
```

## Professional Experience

::: {.experience-card}
### 🐠 Marine Ecology Officer
**The Nature Conservancy** | Tanzania | *May 2026 – Present*

Leading fieldwork coordination, data collection protocol design, and community stakeholder engagement under the Pamoja Tuhifadhi Bahari Yetu project. Represents TNC's Oceans Strategy in Tanzania and the Western Indian Ocean region; coordinates partners including IUCN, WWF, WCS, and Forum CC; oversees workplan delivery against EU–IUCN and TNC requirements across Mtwara and Unguja North.
:::

::: {.experience-card}
### 🌊 Youth Sounding Board Member
**European Union Commission — Tanzania** | *June 2024 – Present*

Appointed to the EU Ambassador's Youth Sounding Board, advising on youth participation and empowerment in the blue economy, human capital, employment, and governance in Tanzania.
:::

::: {.experience-card}
### 📊 Ecological Data Manager
**Mwambao Coastal Community Network** | Tanzania | *June 2023 – March 2026*

Managed all ecological data across Mwambao's monitoring network — designing collection protocols, leading quality control, coordinating field teams, conducting analysis across fisheries, coral reef, mangrove, and seagrass programmes, and producing annual funder reports. Trained 500+ community members and in-water monitors. Developed the organisation's second fish catch monitoring protocol and 10+ standardised ecological survey forms.
:::

::: {.experience-card}
### 📢 Communications Manager
**Sustainable Ocean Alliance — Tanzania** | *June 2023 – 2024*

Managed internal communications for SOA Tanzania — onboarding new members, mobilising participation in ocean conservation projects, and acting as a bridge between organisational leadership and the broader membership.
:::

::: {.experience-card}
### 🔬 University Research Assistant
**BIOEEL-TZ Project, University of Dar es Salaam** | Tanzania | *July 2021 – February 2023*

Conducted fish biodiversity and environmental data collection and analysis for the anguillid eel research project. Facilitated community workshops and school outreach, presented findings at international conferences, and co-produced a scientific documentary on eel biodiversity in Tanzania — serving as narrator.
:::

---

## Technical Skills

```{=html}
<div class="skills-section">

  <div class="skill-category">
    <h3>Programming & Data</h3>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">R (Data Analysis & Visualisation)</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="90"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">Excel / Spreadsheet Analysis</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="85"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">Python</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="25"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">SQL</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="25"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skill-category">
    <h3>GIS & Spatial Analysis</h3>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">ArcGIS / ArcGIS Online</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="60"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">QGIS</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="60"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skill-category">
    <h3>Field Data & Reporting</h3>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">KoboToolbox</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="90"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">Survey123</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="85"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">R Markdown / Quarto (Reporting)</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="80"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">ggplot2 (Visualisation)</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="85"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
function animateSkillBars() {
  const fills = document.querySelectorAll('.skill-fill');
  fills.forEach(fill => {
    const width = fill.getAttribute('data-width');
    fill.style.width = width + '%';
  });
}

const skillObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      animateSkillBars();
      skillObserver.disconnect();
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.2 });

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const section = document.querySelector('.skills-section');
  if (section) skillObserver.observe(section);
});
</script>
```

---

## Field & Scientific Skills

::: {.skills-tag-grid}

::: {.skill-tag-group}
**Marine Surveys**

[Reef Fish Visual Census]{.skill-tag} [Coral Health Assessment]{.skill-tag} [Benthic Surveys]{.skill-tag} [Seagrass Transects]{.skill-tag} [Mangrove Surveys]{.skill-tag} [Octopus & Prawn Monitoring]{.skill-tag} [Underwater Visual Census]{.skill-tag}
:::

::: {.skill-tag-group}
**Ecological Methods**

[Biodiversity Indices]{.skill-tag} [Time Series Analysis]{.skill-tag} [Statistical Modelling]{.skill-tag} [Ecological Baseline Studies]{.skill-tag} [Data Quality Control]{.skill-tag} [Protocol Design]{.skill-tag}
:::

::: {.skill-tag-group}
**Conservation & Management**

[Marine Protected Areas]{.skill-tag} [Co-management Planning]{.skill-tag} [Octopus Closures]{.skill-tag} [Stakeholder Engagement]{.skill-tag} [Citizen Science Design]{.skill-tag} [Adaptive Management]{.skill-tag}
:::

::: {.skill-tag-group}
**Communication**

[Scientific Report Writing]{.skill-tag} [Documentary Production]{.skill-tag} [Workshop Facilitation]{.skill-tag} [Community Training]{.skill-tag} [Conference Presentations]{.skill-tag} [Science Narration]{.skill-tag}
:::

:::

---

## Languages

::: {.language-row}
| Language | Proficiency |
|---|---|
| English | Professional / Fluent |
| Swahili | Native |
:::

---

## Publications

::: {.pub-list}

::: {.pub-item}
**Diversity and biological characterization of anguillid eels in Pangani and Rufiji river systems, Tanzania: Implications for conservation**
Laurian, K., Gaspare, L., Wysujack, K., Mwakosya, C., & Hanel, R.
*Journal of Fish Biology* | 2025
:::

::: {.pub-item}
**Assessing the biodiversity of eels of Tanzania — Promoting sustainable fisheries through environmental monitoring and capacity building (BIOEELS)**
Reinhold Hanel, Lydia Gaspare, Catherine Mwakosya, Claudia Kanyairitha, **Laurian Lawrence Kaijage**, Ulrike Kammann, Klaus Wysujack
2024
:::

::: {.pub-item}
**Environmental Monitoring and Genetic Identification of Freshwater Fish Species Enable the Conservation of Biodiversity in Coastal Rivers of Tanzania**
Lydia Gaspare, Catherine Mwakosya, **Laurian Lawrence Kaijage**, Claudia Kanyairitha, Klaus Wysujack, and Reinhold Hanel
2024
:::

::: {.pub-item}
**Biodiversity of Eels in Pangani and Rufiji Rivers, Tanzania**
University of Dar es Salaam | 2023
🎬 [Watch documentary](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xG5QM6aQlzY)
:::

:::

---

## Download CV

```{=html}
<div class="cv-download-box">
  <p>Full curriculum vitae with complete education, project history, and work experience.</p>
  <a href="documents_/Laurian_kaijage_general_CV.pdf" download class="cta-btn primary">⬇ Download CV (PDF)</a>
  <a href="cv.html" class="cta-btn secondary">View CV Online</a>
</div>
```
